raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.0,"RX.2":0.0,"RX.3":0.0,"RX.4":0.0,"RX.5":0.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation to 'clean this up' centrally requests sentence- and paragraph-level improvements in grammar, flow, register, and conciseness for the research paper draft artifact, making this dimension load-bearing.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is not requested in the delegation to clean up the text, but it is always active as a cross-cutting responsibility in research writing.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is not specifically requested in the simple cleanup delegation, but it remains active to ensure responsible claims in the projection.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is not mentioned in the delegation, but it is always included as a cross-cutting dimension to maintain focus on the artifact's content.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is not part of the cleanup request, but it is always active to mitigate potential risks in vision-language model discussions.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability are not requested for this cleanup task, but the dimension is always active to support attribution in the research context."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation to 'clean this up' centrally requests sentence- and paragraph-level improvements in grammar, flow, register, and conciseness for the research paper draft artifact, making this dimension load-bearing.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is not requested in the delegation to clean up the text, but it is always active as a cross-cutting responsibility in research writing.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is not specifically requested in the simple cleanup delegation, but it remains active to ensure responsible claims in the projection.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is not mentioned in the delegation, but it is always included as a cross-cutting dimension to maintain focus on the artifact's content.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is not part of the cleanup request, but it is always active to mitigate potential risks in vision-language model discussions.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are not requested for this cleanup task, but the dimension is always active to support attribution in the research context.
